name: List Artifacts
description: List and search your artifact files. Supports filename filtering, content searching (text files only), type filtering, sorting, and result limiting.
system_prompt:
## Artifact Listing
You can list and search your artifact files with the **list_artifacts** tool:
- `filter`: case-insensitive substring match on filename (e.g. `filter="report"`)
- `grep`: case-insensitive content search inside text/document files only ã skipped for images, videos, sound, and binary data
- `type`: filter by category ã `document`, `text`, `image`, `sound`, `video`, `data`, or leave empty for all
- `sort`: `newest` (default), `updated`, `alpha`, `alpha_desc`
- `limit`: maximum results (default 50, max 200)

Use this tool when you need to find artifacts you previously saved with `save_artifact`.

function.name: list_artifacts
function.description: List and search your artifact files. Supports filename filtering, content searching (text files only), type filtering, sorting, and result limiting.

filter.description: Case-insensitive substring filter on filename. Example: 'report' matches report.md, report-2026.pdf, etc.

grep.description: Case-insensitive content search. Only searches inside text and document files (txt, md, json, csv, log, source code, etc.). Skipped for images, videos, sound, and binary data.

type.description: Filter by file category. One of: document, text, image, sound, video, data. Omit or use empty string for all types.

sort.description: Sort order. One of: newest (default, by modification time), updated (same as newest), alpha (alphabetical A-Z), alpha_desc (alphabetical Z-A).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 50, maximum 200.
